summary: MindTrack MVP tested end-to-end (backend + mobile web). Backend: 24/24 pytest tests passed (auth, disorders, catalog, symptoms/energy, tasks with anti-cheat 429, journal with linked_symptoms, awards, admin music upload 403/200, mocked /reports/send). Frontend: Landing -> Signup -> Onboarding (pick disorders) -> Home (energy slider + symptom chips) -> navigation across Tasks, Rewards, Journal, Graphs, Send tabs all render and are interactive via testIDs. Task create + Start/Done/Interval/Delete visible. Rewards shows 3 choice cards + progress bar. Send report returns MOCKED response in UI. Graphs tab renders empty-state messages when no data (no SVG yet, expected).

integration_issues.issue: Spec says 'submit redirects to /rewards' but in test the home-submit-btn click left URL on /home (no symptoms/energy change may have short-circuited). Please verify intended behavior: should home submit always navigate to /rewards, or only when at least one symptom was logged?

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecation console warnings: 'shadow*' style props (use boxShadow), expo-av deprecated in SDK 54 (use expo-audio/expo-video), props.pointerEvents, Image style.resizeMode. These are non-blocking but should be migrated before prod.

action_items: Verify intended behavior of Home -> Rewards redirect on submit (spec vs. implementation mismatch)
Migrate expo-av to expo-audio/expo-video per SDK 54 deprecation (for music playback on Tasks tab)
Replace shadow* style props with boxShadow to silence RN web warnings
critical_code_review_comments: server.py 788 lines is large but still readable; consider splitting into routers (auth, tasks, journal, awards, admin) once app grows further.
CORS allow_origins=['*'] combined with allow_credentials=True is not spec-compliant and will be ignored by browsers for credentialed requests. Not affecting Bearer-token auth, but worth tightening.
JWT_SECRET is read via os.environ without a safe default check at startup — good (fails fast). Ensure it is set in production env.
Anti-cheat uses last-done globally (across all tasks); works as specified. If a user deletes their last done task, the restriction is lifted; consider if that is desired.
frontend/.env uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL as review notes said); frontend code correctly reads process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. OK.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all screens/flows reachable; minor redirect behavior question)

seed_data_creation: Registered dynamic test users via /api/auth/register (prefixed test_/uitest_). Admin seeded automatically on startup (admin@mindtrack.app / Admin@12345). No manual DB seeding needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend public URL: https://symptom-journal-12.preview.emergentagent.com. Auth is JWT Bearer (Authorization header). Admin creds in /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Anti-cheat: 2nd done within 10 min => 429. POST /api/reports/send is MOCKED (records in db.reports_sent, returns note='MOCKED email ...'). testIDs follow kebab-case (home-submit-btn, energy-slider, symptom-<name>, task-title-input, task-add-btn, task-{start|done|interval|delete}-<task_id>, reward-choice-{flowers|candy|giftcard}, journal-text-input, journal-save-btn, journal-timestamp-btn, send-email-input, send-days-<n>, send-submit-btn, onboarding-pick-btn, onboarding-toggle-{adhd|bipolar|autism}, onboarding-save-btn, landing-signup-btn, landing-login-btn, signup-*-input, login-*-input). Graphs tab renders empty states when user has no logs — submit home symptoms/energy first before verifying SVG charts.
rca_of_issue: No blocking bug found. Only concern is whether home-submit-btn is supposed to route to /rewards on success; in this run it stayed on /home because no symptoms were selected. Recommend E1 double-check the code in (tabs)/home.tsx onSubmit handler.
